title: Bounties Are Placed on the Rebels
description: Pages 11–15 focus on bounties are placed on the rebels, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Doflamingo, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as doflamingo announces the rules of his Birdcage game, putting prices on the heads of Luffy, Law, Riku, and the allies who threaten him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You don't have time to be indeed- sIVE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Even as you hesitate, people will fall and your homes will burn around you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What should we do?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Just when we found out that King Riku was innocent all along....!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: If we work together, the whole country as one, we might be able to take on Doflamingo! He's just one man!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Not just one man. If we mean to take dofla- Mingo's head...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We'll have to face the whole Donquixote family!! It's two thousand men strong....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: But King Riku himself was one of those twelve targets!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's not..... it's not like we have to kill them.... If we can just take them captive... there are only twelve of them.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: There's nothing else for it....!! We have to fight!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hey!! What happened to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...that "Cyborg" frankly who was collapsed here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Bar- Rier!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: UWAA- Hhh...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hehahah!! y'all can stay right there!!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Go on ahead!! to the surface!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: BRRR- RIRNING!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: ka- chunk!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Zoro?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Yeah.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Where are you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Robin, huh? Right now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: I'm with luffy and the others...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Apparently this place is called the "King's Plateau"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: But this is a fine mess we've wound up in...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Robin, is that you?! Did you see Mingo just now?! What an ass!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: And USOP... that was really hilari- OUS!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: What was that, Luffy?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Rebecca was on the list too, do you know if she's all right?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Re- Becca is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: I'm right here!! Lucy, is that you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Ahh!! That's great!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: I've got soldier-guy right here...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: ...Wait, huh?! Where did soldier- Guy go?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Eh?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Don't tell me he's....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: There he is!! The one-star convict!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Take him down!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Look, he's only got one leg!! This'll be an easy hundred million!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Mr Soldier?! Mr soldier is human again now, right...?!! Say, Lucy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: What's he like?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Huh?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Did you just say "What's he like"?!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: What're you talk- ing about?! That one- legged soldier...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: ...turned out to be your dad!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: The guy from the statue at the Colos- Seum!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: ...I failed to protect her....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: ...so he really was...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: soldiers like me~ are brave~

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: I will always be by your side~

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: Look!! My body is strong!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: Great news, right?! He's gone off somewhere now, though!! Listen, Rebecca!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: You can't cry yet!! I won't let soldier-guy die!!! So you stay safe too!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: I'm sorry I couldn't get you the Mera Mera no mi you wanted to eat!! But instead...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: I swear I'll beat up that Dofla- Mingo for you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: So stay close to my crew- mates, all right?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: I'll end this game before you know it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: So stay alive!! got that?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: luffy, let me know who's with you right now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: Here we have...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Do you understand what you're doing, straw hat........?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: Our plan was to leave Dofla- Mingo alive and force him into conflict with Kaidou.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #54
dialogue.text: If you defeat Dofla- Mingo now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #55
dialogue.text: ...will be directed at us in- stead!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #56
dialogue.text: We'll be the ones forced into head-on conflict with a furious yonkou!!!

summary: Bounties Are Placed on the Rebels develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Doflamingo, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
